subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! I have perused thy luminous, unique and immaculate letter... Gradually abandon, step by step, that which is but a temporary palliative for some ailment and causeth a weakening of the constitution [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله انی تلوت نمیقتک النورا الخریده الفریده العصماء ... و اترک شیئاً فشیئاً بالتدریج ما هوداء مسکن موقت لبعض داء و مضعف للعروق
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
